versions.prompt_text:
Create a realistic studio product photograph of a single JBL Tour One M2 Wireless Over-Ear Adaptive Noise Cancelling Headphones (Black) in the Wireless Headphones category.

Use this evidence-grounded visual description:
Experience unparalleled comfort and immersive sound with the JBL Tour One M2 Wireless Over-Ear Adaptive Noise Cancelling Headphones in black, featuring plush leatherette ear cushions and a lightweight design for long listening sessions.

Prioritize these supported details:
comfortable design; lightweight design; black

Composition requirements:
- centered composition
- single isolated product
- neutral or studio background
- sharp, clean commercial product photography
- no extra accessories unless directly supported by the source evidence

Avoid these unsupported elements:
avoid unsupported claims about sound quality; avoid vague color descriptions; centered composition; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only
versions.negative_prompt: avoid unsupported claims about sound quality; avoid vague color descriptions; centered composition; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only
negative_constraints: avoid unsupported claims about sound quality
no extra accessories unless explicitly supported

versions.prompt_text:
Create a realistic, presentation-quality product photograph of a single JBL Tour One M2 Wireless Over-Ear Adaptive Noise Cancelling Headphones (Black) in the Wireless Headphones category.

Render the product as:
The JBL Tour One M2 are wireless over-ear headphones featuring a lightweight design, leatherette ear cushions, and impressive sound quality, ideal for immersive listening experiences.

Strongly preserve these evidence-backed visual details:
lightweight design; leatherette ear cushions; weight of 0.6 pounds; sound quality

Scene requirements:
- centered composition
- neutral seamless studio background
- realistic product photography lighting
- single product only
- no lifestyle scene and no extra accessories unless directly supported by evidence

Explicitly avoid:
centered composition; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only

Also avoid mismatches between listing expectation and review reality:
Do not add unsupported embellishments or misleading scale cues.
versions.negative_prompt: centered composition; neutral or studio background; no extra accessories unless explicitly supported; realistic product photography; single product only
negative_constraints: no extra accessories unless explicitly supported
